title: verbascum × semilanatum
intro: Verbascum × semilanatum, also known as mullein, is a hybrid plant belonging to the mullein genus and is characterized by its large, hairy leaves and tall spikes of yellow flowers. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and expectorant properties, which help to soothe respiratory issues such as coughs and colds. The health benefits of Verbascum × semilanatum include reducing inflammation, improving sleep quality, and acting as a natural antihistamine to alleviate allergies. The plant can be used in various herbal preparations, including teas, infusions, salves, and tinctures, which can be used to treat a range of health issues.
